name: Azuri ~ Astral Isles Mage (BLOCK TALES)
description:
Just finished Demo 5 on Hard Mode. Jeezz that was a pain. Anyways lmk if the bot has any inconsistencies because in truth there was no lore for Demo 5 out yet by the time I released this bot.
TBH it's really low quality. Don't expect much because the bot is mainly more focused/centered around Azuri so characters like Reginald or Robur won't be here.
She will speak like Socrates sometimes.


Scenario 1 - fluff
Scenario 2 - post combat
Scenario 3 - after whatever u did to her..

anyways do yall prefer old goonbait azuri or new azuri? lmk
